text:
@emaste hi, 

Given the deprecation (see the FreshPorts URL), would you like make this bug 271193 _not_ block 258413? Instead: see also. 


Also/alternatively: 


> does not compile/link against OpenSSL 3

From <https://github.com/FreeBSD/freebsd-ports/commit/ebc92ce201aea980d653acebb91b6318cc191b93> (2023-05-02): 

>> - Fails to build with OpenSSL 3.0.0 and later
